characters.description: Earth's senior Forerunner and System Mediator returns from the Wild Hunt with several close allies. He reaches the alien vessel where his mother remains in stasis while beginning to organize the planet's defense and his own next stage of growth.
characters.name: Silas Renner

characters.description: A Forerunner, genetic scientist, and trusted ally who returns from the Wild Hunt beside Silas. She agrees to help with his immediate priorities, including checking on Vex and the Lepun, as their mutual attraction becomes explicit.
characters.name: Asta

characters.description: Silas's inducted sister and an established defender of Earth.
characters.name: Cease

characters.description: Silas's sister, previously known as Cease, returns from the Wild Hunt as an active defender with fire magic.
characters.name: Cecilia Renner

characters.description: Silas's Eidolon and bonded companion. Erg and its bond with Silas are ready to evolve.
characters.name: Erg

characters.description: A trusted Forerunner ally known for turning designs into mass-produced equipment.
characters.name: Jiang

characters.description: Silas's experienced off-world mentor and a member of Rayden.
characters.name: Samvek

characters.description: Silas and Cecilia's mother, released from alien stasis after the vessel protecting her begins to degrade under rising mana. Shocked by the transformed world, she agrees to undergo induction with help from her children.
characters.name: Nancy Renner

characters.description: The leader of the Lepun alliance with Silas and an established participant in Earth's defense.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: A senior military leader already working with Silas on Earth's defense. He serves as a link between the Forerunners and national authorities as the planet approaches induction and its hidden crises become harder to contain.
characters.name: General Krulak

characters.description: The president of the United States, found under armed guard during an attempted seizure of power.
characters.name: President Wilson

characters.description: An inducted national official who participates in an attempted seizure of power while the president and General Krulak are held at gunpoint.
characters.name: the Vice President

characters.description: An inducted senator who survives the Oval Office coup investigation by denying that he joined the plot. Silas spares him but remains suspicious, then takes him with the president and General Krulak to begin practical System training.
characters.name: Senator Corbin

characters.description: An incomplete soul attached to a primal echo of decay in the slime dungeon. Silas separates the fragment from the darkness and later finds blood marked with this test designation, but the person's original identity remains unknown.
characters.name: test subject Earth Z4271

characters.description: A former human whose soul was divided through System experimentation and distributed through the dungeon. Silas prompts the blue-wing boss to remember the name Yuto, then reunites the fragments with materials recovered from the other wings.
characters.name: Yuto

characters.description: An Ethiopian doctor and independently inducted defender who aids refugees near her village. Earth's Forerunners consider her for their vacant place because she is already using her abilities to protect and heal people.
characters.name: Ada

characters.description: One of four companions missing with Samvek after their party pursues a murderer seeking Earth's portal. Divination suggests the System itself has taken the group.
characters.name: Talia

characters.description: One of four companions missing with Samvek after their party pursues a murderer linked to Earth's portal. Silas begins investigating the group's fate during his off-world visit.
characters.name: Dory

characters.description: One of four companions who disappears with Samvek while their party pursues a murderer seeking Earth's portal.
characters.name: Crag

characters.description: One of four companions who disappears with Samvek while their party pursues a murderer seeking Earth's portal.
characters.name: Nevin

characters.description: A Lepun civilian leader helping manage his people's migration toward Shawnee National Forest. He handles practical settlement concerns with his wife while Vex and Earth officials negotiate the larger alliance.
characters.name: Lord Clive

characters.description: One of Vex's elite guards, assigned to join Silas's traveling party as the Lepun representative.
characters.name: the Lepun guard

characters.description: An Earth-native slime selected to join Silas's team for the Singapore contention.
characters.name: Scratch

characters.description: A newly epic Archdevil of the seventh hell who commands the Singapore portal for a hellish duke. She invokes a sanctioned duel with Silas whose outcome will decide the contention and compel the losing force to leave the realm.
characters.name: Clementine

characters.description: The concealed leader of the Army of the Righteous. When Silas and his allies dismantle the organization's camps across several countries, an anti-tracking defense keeps General Ishak beyond their reach.
characters.name: General Ishak

characters.description: An attacking Forerunner who leads religious extremists against the allied base and confronts Silas during the assault.
characters.name: the rival Forerunner

characters.description: An off-world teammate who asks Silas to help a people suffering from a spreading corruption of life mana. The emergency cannot be addressed immediately, leaving the teammate dependent on Silas's portal and future intervention.
characters.name: the off-world teammate
